message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 230 migrate 4 wezterm direct-call sites to cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Start of the WezTerm direct-call surface migration. main.rs has
~28 ambient wezterm calls; this tick migrates 4 to establish the
pattern before the batch sweep:

1. L7012 policy-input pane lookup:
   `wezterm.get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`
2. L9023 restart preflight pane listing:
   `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
3. L9190 wait_for_mux_ready loop:
   `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)` (cx hoisted outside loop)
4. L10961 batch get_text spawn body:
   `wezterm.get_text_with_cx(&cx, pane_id, escapes)` (cx fetched
   inside spawn since it's an async move)

Each uses the standard
`Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern from
ticks 224-229. Routes through the WeztermInterface trait's
cx-first methods (defaults delegate to ambient; concrete impls
like WeztermClient override for real cx threading via
MuxPool::<method>_with_cx).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Remaining ambient wezterm direct calls in main.rs: ~24 sites
across CLI commands (robot, human, doctor, restart). Future ticks
continue the batch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
